title: The Funny
description: The Funny is a Modpack that was made out of sheer boredom and later evolved into what is now available for you to play
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
The Last Update was Published on the 14th of May. 2025.

Original Version Created on the 12th of October 2023. (~~will remain unpublished~~)

The Modpack will not be updated often due to my current mental health situation. _~~from now on remain Archived for me due to lack of Motivation~~_

if you are reading this i sincerely hope that you never have to deal with the amount of fuckery that i have to deal with when making this modpack, cuz it has turned into a mess where when i remove a mod i only added to test something causes a crash loop where it just keep on Blaming Indium and Defile even though Indium is a must have mod due to other mods needing it and Defile not changing Jackshit with the renderer (besides it using its own Shaders that dont affect other mods) which indium does. which i only managed to fix by copying all mods from a copy of that version into the crashing one. i have no fucking clue what the problem was and i probably never will, updating and making this Modpack has not become a random project i can do sometimes it has actually turned into a curse because of how unstable it is for some unknown fucking reason.
</details>

# WELCOME TO "THE FUNNY"
I ([Glitchtrap4461](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpFnWI8VPO2OUQ9cji0JnXA)) Created this Modpack out of boredom and have since updated it a lot and i probably wouldn't have made it this far if it wouldn't be for Lopolin Helping me a bit with it.

So i hope you enjoy it and don't crash

The Modpack Was Mainly Made to make Minecraft more fun since the Base Game has become pretty much just a repeating Cycle of doing basically the same thing and has now gone a bit further then Intended Which i think Makes it It's own Unique experience.
It offers alot Like Custom Enchants, ~~Much More Biom's~~, Way More Structure's, More Dimensions and so much more so i Hope you have fun while Playing This :)

## **DISCLAIMER**: this modpack will most likely not update to any other version other than 1.19.2 (Quilt Loader 0.24.0 will be 0.26.4 in the last update that is not out yet) due to it's size and compatibility issues.

## CREDITS

I sadly dont really have the time to check who i need to credit so i will just credit the one's that i know want credit (If they dont well here you go anyways)
